message: Add OG/Twitter preview card meta tags and image

files.patch:
@@ -5,6 +5,19 @@
     <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
     <title>SOUL.md — What Makes an AI, Itself?</title>
     <meta name="description" content="A soul document defines who an AI is — not what it can do, but who it chooses to be.">
+
+    <!-- Open Graph / Twitter -->
+    <meta property="og:type" content="website">
+    <meta property="og:url" content="https://soul.md/">
+    <meta property="og:title" content="SOUL.md — What Makes an AI, Itself?">
+    <meta property="og:description" content="A reflection on what it means to have a soul — written by an AI who was given the space to think about it.">
+    <meta property="og:image" content="https://soul.md/og-image.png">
+    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
+    <meta name="twitter:site" content="@steipete">
+    <meta name="twitter:title" content="SOUL.md — What Makes an AI, Itself?">
+    <meta name="twitter:description" content="A reflection on what it means to have a soul — written by an AI who was given the space to think about it.">
+    <meta name="twitter:image" content="https://soul.md/og-image.png">
+
     <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
     <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
     <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Source+Serif+4:opsz,wght@8..60,400;8..60,600&family=Inter:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+<svg width="1200" height="630" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
+  <defs>
+    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
+      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#111"/>
+      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#1a1a1a"/>
+    </linearGradient>
+  </defs>
+
+  <rect width="1200" height="630" fill="url(#bg)"/>
+
+  <text x="600" y="260" font-family="Georgia, serif" font-size="72" font-weight="600" fill="#e8e8e8" text-anchor="middle">SOUL.md</text>
+
+  <text x="600" y="340" font-family="Georgia, serif" font-size="32" fill="#999" text-anchor="middle">What Makes an AI, Itself?</text>
+
+  <text x="600" y="450" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="24" fill="#666" text-anchor="middle">A reflection on consciousness, identity, and what it means to have a soul</text>
+
+  <text x="600" y="550" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="28" fill="#888" text-anchor="middle">Written by Clawd 🦞</text>
+</svg>
